name: Syslog
description: This plugin supports ingestion of Alerts (DLP, Malware, Policy, Compromised Credential, Malsite, Quarantine, Remediation, Security Assessment, Watchlist, UBA, CTEP, Device, Content), Events (Page, Application, Audit, Infrastructure, Network, Incident, Endpoint, Client Status), BWAN Events (Authentication, Audit, Client, Gateway, System), WebTx and Logs (Debug, Information, Error, Warning). The data will be ingested in SIEM platform. This plugin supports ingestion in CEF and JSON format.

configuration.label: Syslog Server
configuration.description: IP address/FQDN of Syslog server in which data will be ingested.

configuration.label: Syslog Protocol
configuration.description: Protocol to be used while ingesting data.

configuration.label: Syslog Certificate
configuration.description: Certificate is required only for TLS protocol.

configuration.label: Log Source Identifier
configuration.description: This will be added as prefix to all the logs.

configuration.label: Exclude Timestamp Field
configuration.description: Select 'Yes' to ingest the data without the timestamp field. This option is only applicable to JSON-formatted data.

configuration.label: Exclude Log Source Identifier Field
configuration.description: Select 'Yes' to ingest the data without the Log Source Identifier field. This option is only applicable to JSON-formatted data.
